title: The Rich Rewards Group proudly serving the George community
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The Rich Rewards Group is...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - The Rich Rewards Group is honoured and humbled to once again be nominated in multiple categories for the prestigious Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards.


> These nominations are more than just accolades - they represent the heartfelt support of the George community we love and serve.


This year, Pick n Pay Pre-Cap Centre proudly received nominations in an outstanding nine categories: Best Biltong, Best Burger, Best Sushi, Best Takeaway, Best Takeaway Fish & Chips, Best Butchery, Best Convenience Store, Best Fresh Produce Store and Best Supermarket.

We are also thrilled that Pick n Pay Clothing was recognised for Best Clothing for Her and Best Clothing for Him. In Pacaltsdorp, our Pick n Pay branch earned a nomination for Best Water & Filtration, while Overland Liquors at Pre-Cap Centre is honoured to be considered for Best Liquor Store.

Each nomination reminds us that our mission to serve the community with heart and integrity is truly making a difference. We are grateful beyond words to our loyal customers and hardworking teams who make this recognition possible.

Thank you for believing in us!


> PHOTO GALLERY: Rich Rewards Group nominated for Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards


Our story: A local legacy built on family values Eighteen years ago, business partners Fernando Gomes and Carlos da Silva took their first steps with the Pick n Pay franchise team. From the very beginning, it was a family affair - one rooted in unity, service and care.

Today, those same values remain the core of every Pick n Pay and Overland Liquors location under the Rich Rewards Group banner. As a proudly family-owned business, our roots run deep in George.

Our stores reflect our values: competitive pricing, clean and friendly shopping environments, and a commitment to local producers. We love where we live and work - and it shows in everything we do.

Overland Liquors: Independent and proudOverland Liquors, also part of the Rich Rewards Group, brings quality alcoholic beverages at unbeatable value. Competing with large national chains hasn’t stopped us - in fact, it drives us. We pride ourselves on exceptional service, affordability and being your neighbourhood favourite.

A promise to our customersWhether you shop at Pick n Pay or Overland Liquors, we promise to offer top-quality products at great prices, in a space where every shopper feels welcome. We believe all our customers are Smart Shoppers, and everything we do is to give them the best experience possible.

Thank you, GeorgeWinning would be incredible - but being nominated by our community is already a reward in itself. From all of us at Rich Rewards Group: thank you for your trust and support. Let’s keep building something great, together.

Vote for us - and help us bring it home!

https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

Overland Liquors has a winning team!

Pick n Pay Clothing offers something for everyone.

Pick n Pay Pre-Cap Centre has been nominated in 9 categories. The proud owners are from left: Fernando Gomes, Barbara Gomes and Carlos da Silva.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
